data.body: 4cdf (fossillike-blockish-warbler) committed 582fcbe (-76 net); broad unit+interfaces sweep 5425 passed. 7ed9 (moistful-pleased-phoebe) committed 105d863: _snapshot_strip_keys always strips 'signature', emit_legacy_mirror param removed from all call sites; in-memory process_signature re-derivation PRESERVED (631 signing/compaction/reducer tests pass); migrations.md + release-notes record the one-way door. Both RED contract tests GREEN. Stack: c366->28f1->4cdf->7ed9. Remaining: d6bd (BLOCKED E6/F1,T8 — remediating now) then doc-sweep 5566 (reviews last, on top of all removals).
